title: BEACON: pan-cancer prediction of copy-number co-drivers at compact bidirectional promoters
description: BEACON (Bidirectional-promoter Expression And Copy-number Output Navigator) scores compact bidirectional promoters (protein-coding gene pairs with head-to-head TSSs less than 1 kb apart) for copy-number co-driver behaviour across 14 TCGA cancers. This archive contains the source, the precomputed prediction table (792 BDPs x 14 cancers = 11,088 predictions), the reproduction notebook, and the client-side interactive tool. Data derived from cBioPortal TCGA PanCancer Atlas 2018.
